selections.name: Tongue Twister
selections.reason: Drops in class and boasts a field-best 116 speed figure. Castellano takes the mount, and she should get a perfect stalking trip.

selections.name: Tour Jete
selections.reason: Consistent turf performer with a 102 class rating. Draws well inside and has the tactical speed to secure prime positioning.

selections.name: Celestial Express
selections.reason: Rail draw can be advantageous here. Has flashed a 114 speed figure in the past and could outrun her odds.

selections.name: Tiznow Mama
selections.reason: Kendrick Carmouche takes the reins. Has shown flashes of ability and fits well in this claiming level.

danger_horse.name: Baby Sassicaia
danger_horse.reason: Has back class and could close late if the pace melts down, though the outside draw is tricky.

selections.name: Close The Loop
selections.reason: Chad Brown trainee with Manny Franco aboard. Boasts a massive 117 class rating and 105 speed figure. Standout in this maiden field.

selections.name: Into The Unknown
selections.reason: Solid 108 class rating. Needs to overcome the inside rail bias, but has the talent to hit the board.

selections.name: Gotta Gun Runner
selections.reason: Outside draw is a plus given the track bias. Should get a clean trip and improve.

selections.name: Tactically
selections.reason: First-time starter for Thomas Morley with Ricardo Santana Jr. up. Watch the tote board for clues.

danger_horse.name: My First Dinah
danger_horse.reason: Has a 99 class rating and could sneak into the exotics at a price.

selections.name: Acoustic Ave
selections.reason: Linda Rice trainee with a 110 speed figure and 112 class rating. Mid-pack draw is ideal to avoid the dead rail.

selections.name: Ignite The Light
selections.reason: Richard Dutrow runner with strong 108 speed. Tactical speed should put him in a prime pressing position.

selections.name: El Grande O
selections.reason: Outside draw is a major advantage here. Has the speed to cross over and dictate terms or stalk comfortably.

selections.name: Over And Ollie
selections.reason: Another Dutrow entry. Needs to navigate from the inside but has the class (108) to contend if he gets clear.

danger_horse.name: T Kraft
danger_horse.reason: Talented, but the rail draw in a dirt sprint is a severe disadvantage based on track bias.

selections.name: Starship Pegasus
selections.reason: Castellano rides. Boasts a 113 speed figure and 104 class rating. Should get a ground-saving trip.

selections.name: Cosmic Candy Girl
selections.reason: Highest class rating in the field (116). Carmouche will have her rolling late.

selections.name: Boomington
selections.reason: Manny Franco takes the mount. 108 speed figure makes her a major player if she handles the distance.

selections.name: Considerate City
selections.reason: Solid 110 class rating. Dylan Davis can work out a mid-pack stalking trip.

danger_horse.name: Bertrille
danger_horse.reason: Has flashed a 112 speed figure. If she brings her best, she can upset at a price.

selections.name: Maria Callas
selections.reason: Chad Brown and Manny Franco team up. 106 speed and class ratings. Outside draw keeps her out of trouble.

selections.name: Disco Star
selections.reason: Mark Casse trainee with a 113 speed figure. Edgard Zayas should have her prominent early.

selections.name: Boston's Phinest
selections.reason: Castellano rides. 110 class rating indicates she fits well with this group.

selections.name: Charlottesuniverse
selections.reason: Another Casse runner. 113 speed figure makes her dangerous if she gets a clean break.

danger_horse.name: Fairy Godmother
danger_horse.reason: Dylan Davis rides. Has tactical speed and could hang around for a minor award.

selections.name: Willintoriskitall
selections.reason: Manny Franco rides. 111 speed figure and 106 class rating. Mid-pack draw is perfect for this distance.

selections.name: Georgia Magic
selections.reason: Inside draw is tough, but has a 105 speed figure and Jaime Rodriguez is riding well.

selections.name: Ez Roll
selections.reason: Dylan Davis aboard. Consistent runner with a 102 class rating. Will be grinding late.

selections.name: Senegal
selections.reason: Outside draw is beneficial. 107 class rating shows he belongs in this field.

danger_horse.name: Apalta
danger_horse.reason: Has a 108 speed figure and could surprise if the pace sets up for a closer.

selections.name: Rossbeigh
selections.reason: Massive 118 speed figure and 111 class rating. Clement/Franco combo is lethal. The clear horse to beat.

selections.name: Nonno Joe
selections.reason: Dylan Davis rides. 106 speed figure makes him the logical alternative if the favorite falters.

selections.name: Free Refills
selections.reason: Has a 107 speed figure. Needs a trip from the inside but has the numbers to hit the board.

selections.name: Bourboncentric
selections.reason: Flashed a 116 speed figure. Outside draw allows for a clean, wide run.

danger_horse.name: G Five
danger_horse.reason: Carmouche rides. Has a 103 speed figure and could add value to the bottom of exotics.

selections.name: With The Angels
selections.reason: Linda Rice trainee with a field-best 118 class rating. Jose Lezcano should get a perfect stalking trip.

selections.name: Sweet Brown Sugar
selections.reason: Dylan Davis rides. 113 class rating and 104 speed figure. Outside draw is favorable.

selections.name: Soloshot
selections.reason: Rail draw is tricky, but has a 110 speed figure and Jaime Rodriguez is a plus.

selections.name: Sunday Girl
selections.reason: Katie Davis aboard. 111 class rating and 108 speed figure. Will be flying late.

danger_horse.name: Mz Big Bucks
danger_horse.reason: Has a 114 speed figure. If she gets loose on the lead, she could be tough to catch.

selections.name: Trusty Rusty
selections.reason: Carmouche rides. 112 speed figure and 106 class rating. Mid-pack draw is ideal.

selections.name: Concorde Spirit
selections.reason: Outside draw is a major advantage. 109 class rating and 104 speed figure.

selections.name: Assume Nothing
selections.reason: Jamie Ness trainee with Jaime Rodriguez. 106 speed figure makes him a strong contender.

selections.name: Sharp Spark
selections.reason: Manny Franco rides. 103 class rating. Needs to overcome the inside draw but has talent.

danger_horse.name: Peek
danger_horse.reason: Outside draw and a 103 class rating make him a live longshot to hit the board.
